synopsis: Kylo Ren explores Anakin and Padmé's past on Naboo. Kylo and Vaneé journey to the home planet of Kylo's grandmother, Padmé Amidala, to learn more of Vader's dark secrets. Kylo must battle against Storg Veruna and his raiders. And who will rule Naboo when all is said and done?
title: Legacy of Vader #4
